docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Field

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Field do use Phoenix.Component attr :id, :string, default: nil attr :label, :string, default: nil attr :description, :string, default: nil attr :errors, :list, default: [] attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global slot :inner_block, required: true def field(assigns) do ~H"""
{render_slot(@inner_block)}

{@description}

{error}

""" end end

name: field
title: Field
